news.t: Horizon Adds Three ETFs to Its Growing Lineup of Solutions Tailored to Today's Modern Financial Advisor

holdings.infoBox: STOX is an equity ETF with a total of 173 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 6.47%, Roundhill Magnificent Seven ETF at 6.27%, Apple at 6.07%, Alphabet at 5.80%, and Microsoft at 4.28%.

overview.description: The Horizon Core Equity ETF (STOX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking capital appreciation through investments in US companies of any market capitalization. The fund employs tactical options overlay strategies. STOX was launched on Jun 25, 2025 and is issued by Horizon.

data.title: Horizon Adds Three ETFs to Its Growing Lineup of Solutions Tailored to Today's Modern Financial Advisor
data.text: CHARLOTTE, N.C.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Horizon announces launch of three new Exchange Traded Funds (ETFs) on the Chicago Board Options Exchange (CBOE).
